help:
Command
  delete - remove one entity by exact id.

Syntax
  spec-cli delete --id <entity_id> [options]

Options
  --id <entity_id>             Required exact target id.
  --expect-revision <token>    Optional optimistic concurrency guard.
  --dry-run                     Run full checks without filesystem mutation.
  --help, -h                    Print command help.

Rules
  Target lookup uses exact id match only.
  Deletion is blocked when incoming entity_ref references exist.
  Blocking checks include scalar entity_ref and array items with entity_ref type.

Examples
  spec-cli delete --id FEAT-42
  spec-cli delete --id FEAT-42 --expect-revision sha256:...
  spec-cli delete --id FEAT-42 --dry-run
